title: JRose Collections Kids Lucky Bag 3 Pack Set – Superhero, Gamer & Farm Value Bags with 5 Surprises Each – Toys, Games, Crafts, Stickers & Activity Sheets – Party Bag Fillers & Fun Activities
features: 🎉 3 Pack Lucky Bag Bundle – Includes Superhero, Gamer & Farm themes, each filled with exciting toys, puzzles, stickers, and creative activities.
🧩 5 Fun Surprises in Every Bag – Children will love opening each bag to discover unique games, crafts, small toys, and stickers for hours of fun.
✏️ Free Activity Sheets – Each bag comes with themed puzzles, colouring pages, word searches, mazes, or matching games that keep kids learning while they play.
🧸 Perfect for Kids Ages 3+ – Great as party bag fillers, classroom rewards, travel activities, or surprise treats to keep little ones entertained.
✅ Safe & UKCA/CE Certified – All contents meet UK safety standards; not suitable for children under 3 years.
description: Product description Unwrap hours of fun with this 3 Pack Kids Lucky Bag Set, featuring Superhero, Gamer & Farm themes. Each colourful bag contains 5 fun surprises, including toys, puzzles, stickers, crafts, and games. Every bag also includes a free themed activity sheet designed to encourage creative play and learning – from colouring and tracing to matching, mazes, and word searches. Ideal as party bag fillers, classroom rewards, holiday entertainment, or everyday surprises, these Lucky Bags deliver excitement and variety in every pack. Safe, UKCA/CE certified, and suitable for children ages 3+. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. Small parts – choking hazard. Use under adult supervision.
